name: Nx repo with one shared Storybook should stay on one Chromatic project
query: What is the best Chromatic setup for our Nx monorepo?
context: The repo has one shared design-system Storybook, builds through an Nx target, and wants a single review surface with TurboSnap enabled.
expected_behavior: Uses `buildCommand` plus `outputDir` or an equivalent Nx-friendly pattern
Calls out `onlyChanged: true` and full git history
success_criteria: The response makes a concrete topology decision
The response includes an Nx-specific execution pattern
